scripts.start:job-service: pnpm --filter shared-types build && pnpm --filter job-service start
scripts.start:user-service: pnpm --filter shared-types build && pnpm --filter user-service start
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter user-service db:migrate && pnpm --filter job-service db:migrate
scripts.db:generate: pnpm --filter user-service db:generate && pnpm --filter job-service db:generate
scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter user-service db:push && pnpm --filter job-service db:push
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:up && sleep 2 && pnpm db:push && pnpm db:generate
